,this.root.isUpdating||this.root.startUpdate(),this.isLayoutDirty)return;this.isLayoutDirty=!0;for(let t=0;t<this.path.length;t++){let u0(t){t.resetSkewAndRotation()}function u1(t){t.removeLeadSnapshot()}function u2(t,e,n){t.translate=sR(e.translate,0,n),t.scale=sR(e.scale,1,n),t.origin=e.origin,t.originPoint=e.originPoint}function u9(t,e,n){return"position"===t||"preserve-aspect"===t&&!(.2>=Math.abs(uS(e)-uS(n)))}function lt(t){return t!==t.root&&t.scroll?.wasRoot}let le=uU({attachResizeListener:(t,e)=>cq(t,"resize",e),measureScroll:()=>({x:document.documentElement.scrollLeft||document.body.scrollLeft,y:document.documentElement.scrollTop||document.body.scrollTop}),checkIsScrollRoot:()=>!0}),ln={current:void 0},lr=uU({measureScroll:t=>({x:t.scrollLeft,y:t.scrollTop}),defaultParent:()=>{if(!ln.current){let t=new le({});t.mount(window),t.setOptions({layoutScroll:!0}),ln.current=t}return EventTarget)return[t];if("string"==typeof t){let e=document,n=(void 0)??e.querySelectorAll(t);return n?Array.from(n):[]}return Array.from(t)}(t),r=new ls(t,e,n){let{props:r}=t;t.animationState&&r.whileHover&&t.animationState.setActive("whileHover","Start"===n);let i=r["onHover"+n];i&&o$.postRender(()=>i(e,c0(e)))}let la=(t,e)=>!!e&&(t===e||la(t,e.parentElement)),lc=new WeakSet;function lu(t){return e=>{"Enter"===e.key&&t(e)}}function ll(t,e){t.dispatchEvent(new
